name: Orangutini Ananasini
lore:
Lore of Orangutini Ananasini
                                    


It is a combination of orangutan and pineapple . The explanation is similar to that of the ship chini.
Description original text
Orangutini Ananasini! Pu po patapim, Ananasuchi monkey monkey monkey uchi
Orangutini Ananacini! Fu Porta Pim, Ananasch Monkey Monkey Monkey Uchi
